CREATE TABLE test_quantiles (id UInt32, value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT quantileExact(0.5)(value) FROM test_quantiles;
SELECT quantileExact(0.25)(value) FROM test_quantiles;
SELECT quantileExact(0.75)(value) FROM test_quantiles;
SELECT id, quantileExact(0.9)(value) FROM test_quantiles GROUP BY id;
SELECT AVG(value), quantileExact(0.1)(value), quantileExact(0.9)(value) FROM test_quantiles;
CREATE TABLE test_subqueries (id UInt32, group_id UInt32, value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT group_id, quantileExact(0.5)(value) FROM test_subqueries GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT group_id, quantileExact(0.5)(value) FROM (SELECT group_id, value FROM test_subqueries WHERE value > 150) GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT quantileExact(0.5)(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_subqueries WHERE group_id = 1) AS sub;
CREATE TABLE nested_test (group_id UInt32, metrics Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT group_id, quantileExact(0.5)(metrics) FROM nested_test GROUP BY group_id ORDER BY group_id;
SELECT AVG(metrics) FROM nested_test WHERE group_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT group_id FROM nested_test WHERE metrics > 15);
SELECT quantileExact(0.5)(metrics) FROM (SELECT metrics FROM nested_test WHERE group_id = 2) AS q2;
CREATE TABLE complex_test (id UInt32, measure Float64, category String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT category, quantileExact(0.5)(measure) FROM complex_test GROUP BY category;
SELECT category, quantileExact(0.25)(measure) AS q1, quantileExact(0.75)(measure) AS q3 FROM complex_test GROUP BY category;
SELECT SUM(measure) AS total, quantileExact(0.5)(measure) AS median FROM complex_test GROUP BY category;
